extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each category: I counted only the “Against the Subsidiaries” rows (criminal Nil, tax 7, regulatory Nil) and “Against the Company” rows (criminal Nil, tax 3, regulatory Nil); promoter matters add one statutory/regulatory proceeding, while director matters add none, and all “By” rows were excluded. The quantified aggregate against the company and subsidiaries is ₹393.69 million for subsidiaries plus ₹345.42 million for the Company, totaling ₹739.11 million, or ₹73.911 crore; promoter/director amounts were excluded. The contingent-liabilities table states a consolidated Total of ₹947.20 million as at August 31, 2024, used directly rather than re-summing line items, equal to ₹94.72 crore. Company-wide customer concentration for the latest full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024, is based on revenue from operations: top five customers contributed 53.83% and top ten customers 62.49%; the source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
